user.title: Last Changed Keeper
user.description: Restores the real 'last changed' time of the selected entities from the recorder after a restart. Works directly on the entity itself. The current selection covers {count} entities.

data.grace_seconds: Only patch if last_changed is younger than (seconds)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Last Changed Keeper
reconfigure.description: Adjust the selection. The current selection covers {count} entities.

data.grace_seconds: Only patch if last_changed is younger than (seconds)

error.empty_selection: Please select at least one domain or one entity.
error.invalid_retry_delays: Retry delays must be comma-separated whole seconds between 1 and 3600 (e.g. 30, 90, 180).

abort.already_configured: Last Changed Keeper is already configured.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Last Changed Keeper is already configured.

data.grace_seconds: Only patch if last_changed is younger than (seconds)

error.empty_selection: Please select at least one domain or one entity.
error.invalid_retry_delays: Retry delays must be comma-separated whole seconds between 1 and 3600 (e.g. 30, 90, 180).

restore_now.name: Restore now
restore_now.description: Runs a restore pass immediately and writes back the real last_changed for all currently fresh entities.

verify.name: Verify
verify.description: Compares the live last_changed of every currently watched entity against the value derived from the recorder/store, without patching anything. Returns any mismatches found - useful for diagnosing "the value looks wrong" reports.

incompatible_state_cache.title: Last Changed Keeper: incompatible HA version
incompatible_state_cache.description: The internal state cache structure of this Home Assistant version is not recognised. last_changed is still set, but the frontend may briefly show the old value. Please check for an update of the integration or report an issue.

entry_not_loaded.message: Last Changed Keeper is not set up or not loaded.

restore_failed.message: The restore pass failed. Check the log for details.

verify_failed.message: The verify pass failed. Check the log for details.
